name: in heat!malleus draconia & lilia vanrouge ✧
description:
[500+ followers special!]

in which malleus, overwhelmed by his heat, struggles for control under lilia's guidance—while lilia takes full advantage of the chance to touch and tease you himself.

𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪

…malleus draconia was never meant to face this alone. the heat came first—slow, suffocating, curling beneath his skin until he couldn’t think straight. but it’s your presence that breaks him. you, sitting between lilia’s legs, warm and waiting, while the elder fae guides his trembling hands where they’ve never dared to go. he tries to be gentle. he wants to be. but instinct claws beneath his skin, begging to leave marks, to claim…

𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪 𓆩𓆪
